description: The casual slip-on shoe is back with a bang with the Spinal-Intrusion from skechers. Crafted from a smooth leather upper with stylishly dyed overlays, this shoe makes for a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Upper Leather upper with overlays Slip-on style for ease of wear Elastic gores on the sides of the tongue to offers a customised Fit Ergonomically padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole Phylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Outsole TPR outsole with a transparent fabric forefoot that has strategically placed lugs, and lugs on the heel for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner if needed Do not store in direct sunlight
